title: hedyotis centranthoides
intro: Hedyotis centranthoides, also known as Stomachache Grass or Hongjingtian, is a plant species native to China and Southeast Asia, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. It is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which are thought to contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating coughs and sore throats, and promoting wound healing. Hedyotis centranthoides is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, as well as in traditional Chinese medicine formulas to treat various ailments. Additionally, the plant's extracts have been studied for their potential in developing new medicines, highlighting its significance in modern pharmacological research.
